# Docs site build dependencies.
#
# Install:  pip install -r docs/site/requirements.txt
# Build:    cd docs/site && mkdocs build --strict
# Serve:    cd docs/site && mkdocs serve
#
# The [imaging] extra pulls Pillow + cairosvg for the `social` plugin
# (auto-generated Open Graph cards). Without this, mkdocs.yml's
# `plugins: - social:` block will fail at build time.
mkdocs-material[imaging]>=9.5
